name: Chernihiv Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: purity and the silver heraldic field of historic Chernihiv
the historic banner of Chernihiv princes
the black eagle of the historic Chernihiv arms
the crown and details of the arms

description: A white field with a red bordure, charged in the centre with the historic black double-headed eagle of Chernihiv (a saint or cross above), referencing the medieval Chernihiv Principality.
history: Designed by I. Sytyi, A. Hrechylo, and I. Pavlenko and officially adopted on 11 July 2000 by the Chernihiv Oblast Council. The arms derive from the medieval seal of the Chernihiv Principality.

features.role: historic arms of Chernihiv (Saint Vladimir with the Chernihiv eagle)
features.symbolism: the heritage of the medieval Chernihiv Principality
